name: ARTESIAN RESOURCES CORP
business: Artesian Resources Corp provides water and wastewater services to residential, commercial, industrial, governmental, municipal, and utility customers. Its regulated utility segment comprises over 93% of total operating revenues. The company also offers non-utility services such as contract operations and service line protection plans.

exposures.sentence: Our profitability is primarily attributable to the sale of water and wastewater services in our regulated utility business.
Cyberattacks on utility companies have been increasing in recent years.
Through Artesian Utility, we will seek to expand our contract design, engineering and construction services of water and wastewater facilities for developers, municipalities and other utilities.

Climate variability may cause negative impacts to our business if an unexpectedly severe weather event or natural disaster damages our facilities and/or operations or those of our suppliers or independent contractors in our service areas, or from the unintended consequences of regulatory changes that directly or indirectly impose substantial restrictions on our activities or adaptation requirements.

We have been affected and could continue to be further affected, by supplier delays and increased costs, due to the impacts of inflation, tariffs, recession, wars and international conflicts, and/or other macroeconomic factors, which are outside of our control and could affect our results of operations.
Weaknesses in capital and credit markets or increased interest rates may limit our access to capital.

catalysts.event: Construction of a 625,000 gallon per day regional wastewater treatment facility completed in first quarter of 2026.
catalysts.sentence: The new treatment facility was completed in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Received permit for construction of next phase of additional 625,000 gallon per day regional wastewater treatment facility.
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, Artesian Wastewater received a permit from DNREC for construction of the next phase of an additional 625,000 gallon per day regional wastewater treatment facility.

catalysts.event: Entered into Master Loan Agreement with CoBank for $10 million loan.
catalysts.sentence: On March 13, 2026, Artesian Water Maryland and CoBank entered into a Master Loan Agreement, or the MLA, and supplement to the MLA, in which CoBank will make a single loan to Artesian Water Maryland in a principal amount not to exceed $10 million.

catalysts.event: Temporary rate increase of 2.88% placed into effect.
catalysts.sentence: The first temporary rate increase of 2.88% was placed into effect on June 3, 2025 at which time the DSIC rate of 1.66% was set to zero.

catalysts.event: Temporary rate increase of 6.82% placed into effect.
catalysts.sentence: The second temporary rate increase of 6.82% was placed into effect on November 6, 2025.

catalysts.event: Entered into three-year agreement with Worldwide Industries Corporation to paint elevated water storage tanks.
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, Artesian Water entered into a new, three-year agreement with Worldwide Industries Corporation, effective September 1, 2025, to paint elevated water storage tanks.

catalysts.event: Entered into electric supply contract with Constellation NewEnergy effective May 2025 to May 2029.
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, Artesian entered into an electric supply contract with Constellation NewEnergy, Inc. that is effective from May 2025 to May 2029 for Delaware operations.

catalysts.event: Entered into electric supply agreement with WGL Energy effective November 2025 through November 2029.
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, Artesian Water Maryland entered into an electric supply agreement with WGL Energy that is effective from November 2025 through November 2029 for Maryland operations.

catalysts.event: Discontinued enrolling new customers in the ISLP Plan.
catalysts.sentence: The Company discontinued enrolling new customers in the ISLP Plan, effective January 2026.
